exam_en: A nebula is a truly wondrous thing to behold. Named after the Latin word for “cloud”, nebulae are not only massive clouds of dust, hydrogen and helium gas, and plasma; they are also often “stellar nurseries” – i.e. the place where stars are born.
Our sunrooms with opaque roofs may be considered distinct from conservatories with semi-transparent roofs.

exam_en: Pierre was received as if he were a corpse or a leper. On the way to the cemetery the corpse is generally carried to some revered mosque.

exam_en: In business administration, absorptive capacity has been defined as "a firm's ability to recognize the value of new information, assimilate it, and apply it to commercial ends". It is studied on individual, group, firm, and national levels.
exam_ko: 경영학에서 흡수 능력은 "새로운 정보의 가치를 인식하고이를 흡수하며 상업적 목적에 적용하는 회사의 능력"으로 정의되었습니다. 개인, 그룹, 회사 및 국가 수준에서 연구 됩니다.
